About Me

Who I Am

Hey there! I'm Thota Sai Ram, a passionate Full Stack Developer based in Hyderabad, India. I love turning ideas into beautiful, functional web experiences.

I specialize in building modern applications using React, Node.js, and JavaScript. I'm always exploring new technologies and love solving real-world problems through code.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring open source projects, contributing to the developer community, or learning something new.
